nodes.name: Bean Burrito Bowl — Garden Veg Bake
nodes.description: name: Bean Burrito Bowl — Garden Veg Bake | short_description: A baked bean burrito bowl featuring black beans, rice, corn, lettuce, salsa, and cheddar—vegetarian and hearty with garden-veg appeal. |
nodes.premise: Meal: Bean Burrito Bowl — Garden Veg Bake - name: Bean Burrito Bowl — Garden Veg Bake | short_description: A baked bean burrito bowl featuring black beans, rice, corn, lettuce, salsa, and cheddar—vegetarian and hearty with garden-veg appeal. | meal_suggestion: Great for a quick, plant-forward meal or meal prep. To balance macros, consider brown rice and/or extra beans, use reduced-fat cheese or plant-based cheese, and add extra veggies or avocado for healthy fats. | nutrition_note: Bean-based protein plus fiber from beans and corn; contains calcium from cheddar and some saturated fat. Includes vegetables from lettuce and salsa. Overall provides complex carbs and protein, but can be higher in sodium and fat due to cheese and salsa. For a lighter version, use reduced-fat cheddar or omit cheese, swap white rice for brown rice, and add more veggies (e.g., peppers or avocado) for extra nutrients.

nodes.name: Soba Noodle Bowl — Mild-Spice Style
nodes.description: name: Soba Noodle Bowl — Mild-Spice Style | short_description: Soba noodles with cucumber, carrots, and egg in a mild-spice sesame dressing. | meal_suggestion: Great as a light lunch. To boost protein
nodes.premise: Meal: Soba Noodle Bowl — Mild-Spice Style - name: Soba Noodle Bowl — Mild-Spice Style | short_description: Soba noodles with cucumber, carrots, and egg in a mild-spice sesame dressing. | meal_suggestion: Great as a light lunch. To boost protein, add tofu or grilled chicken; add greens like spinach or bok choy; reduce sodium by using a low-sodium sesame dressing or serving the dressing on the side. | nutrition_note: Balanced bowl with complex carbs from soba, fiber from cucumber and carrots, and protein from egg. Contains sesame and egg; gluten content depends on soba (many varieties contain wheat). Sodium can be moderate to high from the dressing. Mild spice; avoid if sesame or egg allergies.

nodes.name: Black Bean Wrap — Classic Combo
nodes.description: name: Black Bean Wrap — Classic Combo | short_description: A wholesome plant-based wrap featuring a whole-wheat tortilla, black beans, avocado, lettuce, and salsa for a satisfying, fiber- and protein-
nodes.premise: Meal: Black Bean Wrap — Classic Combo - name: Black Bean Wrap — Classic Combo | short_description: A wholesome plant-based wrap featuring a whole-wheat tortilla, black beans, avocado, lettuce, and salsa for a satisfying, fiber- and protein-rich meal. | meal_suggestion: Serve with a side of fruit or veggie sticks; squeeze lime and sprinkle cilantro for freshness; ideal for meal prep as a make-ahead wrap. | nutrition_note: Plant-based, fiber-rich meal with protein from black beans and healthy fats from avocado; whole-wheat wrap adds more fiber. Salsas vary in sodium, so portion size matters.
